content: I will write a script to scan `transcript.jsonl` for all `VIEW_FILE` actions that read parts of `src/App.tsx` during the active session. This will allow us to recover the full code for `renderHDNTDocument`, `renderHDTCDocument`, `renderHDCMDocument`, `renderGdnDocument`, `InlineField`, and other layout helper components.

args.Description: "Extracts all VIEW_FILE contents of App.tsx from the transcript.jsonl log."
args.toolAction: "Creating script to extract all viewed files from logs"
